content.question: What proportion of 6- and 8-year gimnáziums are maintained by churches, minority governments, private operators, and the central state respectively, and does this distribution vary by region or urban–rural geography?
content.reduction_path: Obtain administrative data from the Klebelsberg Centre and church education authority databases on school maintenance status, disaggregated by track type and location; cross-reference with Ministry of Education enrollment records to establish the scope of any reform requiring multi-actor negotiation.
